properties.name: icon-size
properties.description: St/Clutter: Size of the icon. Used by StIcon.

properties.name: icon-shadow
properties.description: St/Clutter: Shadow applied to the icon. Used by StIcon.

properties.name: icon-padding
properties.description: St/Clutter: Padding around the icon. Used by StIcon.

properties.name: spacing
properties.description: St/Clutter: Spacing between children. Used by StBoxLayout and similar.

properties.name: -natural-hpadding
properties.description: St: Natural horizontal padding. Used by St widgets (e.g. panel buttons).

properties.name: -minimum-hpadding
properties.description: St: Minimum horizontal padding. Used by St widgets (e.g. panel buttons).

properties.name: -st-icon-style
properties.description: St: Icon style for StIcon. Controls symbolic vs regular icon lookup.

properties.name: -st-shadow
properties.description: St: Generic shadow (color, xoffset, yoffset, blur, spread, inset). Used by St.ThemeNode.

properties.name: -st-background-image-shadow
properties.description: St: Shadow for background-image. Used by St.ThemeNode (get_background_image_shadow).

properties.name: -shell-grid-item-size
properties.description: GNOME Shell: Size of app grid items in the overview.
